title: NormArchetype
description: Schema for Norm Ascriptions — measurable governance assertions (DNA 'N'). A Norm operates within the governance scope opened by a Directive — it constrains only the internal Elements (Mechanisms, Effectors, Receptors, Interactions) of the governed Structure along the qualifier Archetype's viability dimension. Natural grammar: {structure} ON {qualifier}: WHEN {applicability} ASSERT {assertion} ({toleranceMode}). DM validates CEL expressions against their profiles. Extensible — tenant-defined archetypes MAY extend Norm via allOf to add domain-specific measurement vocabulary while inheriting the governance grammar. DM input = DM output (1:1).

structure.description: ID reference to the governed Structure — the Structure whose internal Elements are constrained and which is accountable for compliance. Governance chain: Norm.structure references the same Structure as the legitimating Directive.purpose. Scope rule: the Norm constrains only the governed Structure's internal Elements (Mechanisms, Effectors, Receptors, Interactions).

qualifier.description: ID reference to the Archetype that the assertion constrains — mirrors Directive.qualifier. Enables governance chain validation and direct queryability ('all Norms targeting SecurityProperties') without CEL parsing.

applicability.description: CEL expression conforming to the applicability CEL profile — activation condition. Assertion is only evaluated when applicability is true. Default: 'true' (unconditional).

assertion.description: CEL expression conforming to the assertion CEL profile → bool. References exactly one Archetype by name as root identifier, then navigates its JSON Schema fields.

toleranceMode.description: How violations are measured over time. Discriminates which temporal fields are required.

temporalWindow.description: ISO 8601 duration for time-based tolerance modes. Required when toleranceMode is AGGREGATED or SUSTAINED.

temporalAggregation.description: Aggregation function applied within the temporalWindow. Required when toleranceMode is AGGREGATED or SUSTAINED.

sustainedThreshold.description: Ratio [0,1] — fraction of temporalWindow the assertion must hold. Required when toleranceMode = SUSTAINED.
